Name: Redgate - Create Oracle Release
Description:
This step will use the [Redgate Oracle Deployment Suite](https://www.red-gate.com/products/oracle-development/deployment-suite-for-oracle/).  It will create a delta sql script and report so you can review it prior to being deployed to the Oracle Server.  This step will download a package containing the scripts generated by Redgate Source Control for Oracle.

Please note: the Redgate Oracle Deployment Suite must be installed on the target machine for this to work.  The target machine must also have the ability to connect to the Oracle database.

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.InstallPath
Parameters.Label: Deployment Suite for Oracle Install Path
Parameters.HelpText: The location where the Deployment Suite for Oracle is installed to

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.PackageFeed
Parameters.Label: Package Feed Id
Parameters.HelpText: The id of the package feed to use.  This will use the default feed id.  If you need to use another feed id you can go to library -> external feeds and select the feed you want to use.  If you look in the url, that is the feed id.

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.PackageName
Parameters.Label: Package Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the package to deploy

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.ExportPath
Parameters.Label: Export Path
Parameters.HelpText: The path where the scripts and reports will be exported to

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.Server
Parameters.Label: TNS Name
Parameters.HelpText: The TNS Name entry in tnsnames.ora containing the necessary connection information

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.Username
Parameters.Label: Oracle Username
Parameters.HelpText: The username of the user to sign with

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.Password
Parameters.Label: Oracle User Password
Parameters.HelpText: The password of the user to login with

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.SourceSchema
Parameters.Label: Source Schema
Parameters.HelpText: The source schema you wish to deploy from

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.FilterPath
Parameters.Label: Custom Filter Path (optional)
Parameters.HelpText: By default, the filter.scpf will be used, if present for the deployment.  Provide a relative path to the filter file you wish to use. It will be the path relative to the schema folder provided.

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.BehaviorOptions
Parameters.Label: Behavior Options (optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the behavior options as listed out in the [documentation for Schema Compare for Oracle](https://documentation.red-gate.com/sco5/using-the-command-line/command-line-switches#Commandlineswitches-/behavior:%3Cvalue%3E).

Default is "hdr" (scriptheader, defineoff, and detectcolumnrenames)

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.ExcludeOptions
Parameters.Label: Exclude Options (optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the exclude options as listed out in the [documentation for Schema Compare for Oracle](https://documentation.red-gate.com/sco5/using-the-command-line/command-line-switches#Commandlineswitches-/exclude:%3Cbehavior%3E).

Default is no exclusions

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.ExcludeDependencies
Parameters.Label: Exclude Dependencies
Parameters.HelpText: Excludes dependent (referenced) objects from deployment.  Default is false.

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.IgnoreOptions
Parameters.Label: Ignore Options (optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the ignore options as listed out in the [documentation for Schema Compare for Oracle](https://documentation.red-gate.com/sco5/using-the-command-line/command-line-switches#Commandlineswitches-/ignore:%3Cvalue%3E).  

Default is "sdwqgva" (slowdependencies, dependentobjects, whitespace, doublequotes, storage, sequencevalue, and mviewvalue)

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.StorageOptions
Parameters.Label: Storage Options (optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the storage options as listed out in the [documentation for Schema Compare for Oracle](https://documentation.red-gate.com/sco5/using-the-command-line/command-line-switches#Commandlineswitches-/storage:%3Cvalue%3E).

The default is "none"

Parameters.Name: Redgate.Oracle.IncludeIdentical
Parameters.Label: Include Identical
Parameters.HelpText: Include Identical options in the generated HTML report
